---
title: "Lecture 2"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

# Lecture 2 {#lecture2}

## Overview

Notes from Lecture 2 of Applied Computational Analysis.

*Note: This section should be filled in based on the content from `lecture-notes/Lecture2.pdf`.*

## Key Topics

<!-- Add key topics covered in this lecture -->

## Main Content

<!-- Add detailed notes from the lecture -->

## Examples and Exercises

<!-- Add examples and exercises from the lecture -->

## Summary

<!-- Add a summary of the main points covered -->

---
